---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g. "I find it frustrating that ...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, or any other context.

---

> **Tip:** The more specific you are about the problem, the easier it is for us to find the best solution together.
